title: An idealized protocol to assess the nesting procedure in regional climate modelling
author: Li, Shan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
These files contain Supplementary information for the article Li et al. 2020 "An idealized protocol to assess the nesting procedure in regional climate modelling", published in International Journal of Climatology, 15 August 2020, https://doi.org/10.1002/joc.6801 

 LMDZ4_compilation.docx provides detailed information and guidance to compile the code and to run simulations. 

 LMDZ4_code.tar.gz contains the computing source code. 

 LMDZ4_data.tar.gz contains configuration files, boundary conditions and job-launching shell scripts.
